RESIDENTIAL LEASE AGREEMENT

This Residential Lease Agreement ("Agreement") is entered into as of January 1, 2025, between:

LANDLORD: John Smith Properties LLC ("Landlord")
TENANT: Jane Doe ("Tenant")

1. PROPERTY
Landlord hereby leases to Tenant the property located at 123 Main Street, Apt 4B, Austin, TX 78701
("Premises") for residential purposes only.

2. TERM
The lease term shall commence on February 1, 2025 and end on January 31, 2026 ("fixed" term).
This lease shall automatically renew for successive one-year terms unless Tenant provides written
notice of non-renewal at least 60 days prior to expiration.

3. RENT
Tenant agrees to pay $2,200.00 per month, due on the 1st of each month. A late fee of $150
shall be charged for any payment received after the 5th of the month. Returned checks will incur
a $50 fee.

4. SECURITY DEPOSIT
Tenant shall pay a security deposit of $4,400.00 prior to occupancy. Landlord may deduct from
the security deposit any amounts deemed necessary for cleaning, repairs, or restoration to original
condition, at Landlord's sole discretion.

5. UTILITIES
Tenant shall be responsible for all utilities including electricity, gas, water, sewer, and trash
removal. Tenant shall maintain utilities in their name throughout the lease term.

6. MAINTENANCE AND REPAIRS
Tenant agrees to maintain the Premises in good condition. Tenant shall be responsible for all
repairs under $200. Landlord shall be responsible for repairs above $200, except those caused
by Tenant negligence.

7. ENTRY BY LANDLORD
Landlord may enter the Premises at any time for inspection, repairs, maintenance, or any other
purpose deemed necessary by Landlord, without prior notice to Tenant.

8. PETS
No pets of any kind shall be permitted on the Premises without prior written consent of Landlord.
If Tenant obtains written consent, a non-refundable pet fee of $500 per pet shall be required.

9. SUBLETTING
Tenant shall not sublet the Premises or any part thereof without the prior written consent of
Landlord, which may be withheld at Landlord's sole and absolute discretion.

10. EARLY TERMINATION
If Tenant terminates this lease prior to the end of the term, Tenant shall be liable for all
remaining rent through the end of the lease term plus a termination fee equal to two (2) months
rent. Landlord's obligation to mitigate damages is expressly waived by Tenant.

11. LIABILITY WAIVER
Tenant waives all claims against Landlord for any injury, damage, or loss occurring on the
Premises or in common areas, including but not limited to personal injury, property damage,
or theft, regardless of cause.

12. INSURANCE
Tenant is strongly encouraged but not required to maintain renter's insurance. Landlord's
insurance does not cover Tenant's personal property.

13. ALTERATIONS
Tenant shall make no alterations, additions, or improvements to the Premises without prior
written consent of Landlord. Any alterations made without consent may result in forfeiture
of the security deposit and additional charges.

14. PARKING
One assigned parking space (#42) is included. Additional vehicles must use street parking.
Unauthorized vehicles may be towed at owner's expense.

15. NOTICES
All notices shall be in writing and delivered personally or by certified mail to the addresses
stated herein.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, the parties have executed this Agreement as of the date first written above.

LANDLORD: John Smith Properties LLC
TENANT: Jane Doe
